title: Fallen Hunter
description: After losing everything she holds dear in a heartbeat, can this galactic protector keep from becoming one of the monsters she hates?

title: The Futility of Intent
description: Lieutenant Dee Terganon will wipe out the last bastions of demons on Laconia even if it kills her.

title: Into the Aether
description: The final epic battle for the galaxy has begun. Only a small team stands between Earth and Anum's demon hordes.

title: Focus on the Wind
description: A deeper dive into the worlds of the Anisian Convergence, exploring the boundaries of human and celestial reach.

title: Last Bid for a Dying Earth
description: The story that started it all. Discover the origins of the rifts and the brave souls who stood against the darkness.

title: Spellbound and Confused
description: A masterclass in the 'reluctant protagonist' trope, filtering cosmic weirdness through the lens of mundane annoyance.

title: Magic and Misfits
description: Successfully expands the world and Darren's role in it. The introduction of the Misfit Study Group is a strong addition.

title: Paws and Effect
description: A crucial turning point for Darren as he transitions from trainee to bored officer. Focuses on thefts of 'worthless' human junk.

title: Static and Spells
description: The 'Disaster Movie' plot and Darren's elevation to a 'Strategic Asset' and 'Sink'.

title: The Whitestone Treaty
description: The finale risks becoming too epic and losing its heart. Grounds the entire cosmic resolution in the most personal relationship of the series.

title: Soundless
description: In a world where sound is a death sentence, one man discovers the power to break the silence.

title: Chronicles of a Mad God
description: The boundary between divinity and insanity blurs as the mad god's influence spreads.

title: Lavender Footsteps
description: Echoes of a forgotten world haunt those who walk among the lavender fields.
